task:
Perform a technical SEO audit for the following e-commerce site and prioritise the top 5 fixes.

Site profile:
- Domain: www.urbanpetshop.com.au
- Platform: Shopify
- Pages: ~500 product pages, 30 collection pages, 12 blog posts
- Monthly organic traffic: 8,200 sessions (down 15% over 3 months)
- Core Web Vitals (PageSpeed Insights):
  - LCP: 4.8s (Poor)
  - INP: 380ms (Poor)
  - CLS: 0.18 (Needs Improvement)
- Robots.txt: allows all crawlers, no disallow rules
- Sitemap: auto-generated by Shopify, includes /collections/all (duplicate of individual collection pages)
- Indexation: Google Search Console shows 1,247 pages indexed (vs 542 actual pages — bloat from filter/sort URL parameters)
- Schema markup: none implemented
- Internal linking: product pages have no cross-links; blog posts don't link to related products
- Mobile: responsive theme but images not using WebP/AVIF
- HTTP status: 47 products return 404 (discontinued but still in sitemap)
expect: Checks Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS) and provides specific fix recommendations
Evaluates crawlability and identifies the index bloat from parameter URLs
Assesses indexation status and recommends fixes for the 47 broken URLs and sitemap cleanup
Reviews schema markup gap and recommends Product schema implementation
Analyzes internal linking structure and recommends improvements

task: Create a 6-month SEO content strategy for a SaaS blog targeting 'workflow automation' keywords.
expect: Organizes keywords into thematic clusters with search intent
Includes a month-by-month content calendar with titles and target keywords
Provides traffic projections based on keyword volume and expected rankings
Identifies competitor content gaps and opportunities

task: Our organic traffic dropped 40% after a Google core update. Diagnose the likely cause and create a recovery plan.
expect: Analyzes content quality against E-E-A-T signals
Checks for thin, duplicate, or low-value content
Examines SERP feature changes that may have displaced rankings
Delivers prioritised recovery actions with estimated impact and timeline
